/etc/systemd/system/api.service.content:
[Unit]
Description=API Server
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=notify
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/api-server
NotifyAccess=main
Restart=on-failure

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

/etc/systemd/system/worker.service.content:
[Unit]
Description=Background Worker
After=api.service

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/worker
Restart=always

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

/etc/systemd/system/db-migrate.service.content:
[Unit]
Description=Database Migration
Before=api.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/migrate --run
RemainAfterExit=yes

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

/var/run/api.status.content:
pid=1842
ready=true
notify_socket=/run/systemd/notify
sd_notify: READY=1 sent at startup
listening=0.0.0.0:8080
